title: Michael Moran
compiled_truth: Michael Moran is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-12 to 2001-08-22), Michael Moran sent 7 and received 335 emails, totalling 342 interactions. Top correspondents: [Drew Fossum](people/drew-fossum) (5), [Louis Soldano](people/louis-soldano) (2), [Dorothy Mccoppin](people/dorothy-mccoppin) (1), [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (1), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (1).
